guides.summary: High-skill dive Duelist who picks off isolated supports and low-health targets, then escapes before the team can punish him — a flanker, not a brawler.
combos: Beginner pick: Web Cluster → Pull → melee combo → punch → punch → escape
Standard kill: Tracer → Get Over Here → melee combo → basic attack → Web Cluster → basic attack → escape
Advanced dive: high ground → swing cancel → Tracer → Pull → melee combo → air punch → ground punch → swing out immediately
commonMistakes: Diving straight into the enemy team instead of coming from behind, above, or around
Fighting tanks instead of hunting supports and low-health DPS
Staying one extra second after a combo fails instead of disengaging immediately
Opening with the ultimate instead of saving it for when the enemy is already grouped or committed
Chasing a target who already escaped instead of resetting

guides.summary: Elite Strategist who blends heavy healing with poke damage and a freeze that shuts down divers, then swings fights with a flexible heal/damage ultimate.
combos: Self-defense: Absolute Zero (freeze) → primary fire → Ice Arts → primary fire → disengage
Anti-diver: freeze the diver → headshots → Ice Arts → keep distance → finish
Teamfight: Share the Stage on priority target → primary healing → Ice Arts → heal team → ultimate at fight start
commonMistakes: Sitting on the ultimate too long instead of using it to win the fight in front of you
Only healing and never using primary fire's poke damage
Wasting Absolute Zero (freeze) randomly instead of saving it for a dive or a key enemy ability
Standing still instead of repositioning behind cover
Chasing kills across the map instead of staying with the team

guides.summary: Disruption Vanguard, not a damage sponge — his job is diving priority targets, isolating them with Radioactive Lockdown, shielding the team, and forcing the enemy to react to him.
combos: Basic engage: Leap → Radioactive Lockdown → Heavy Blow → Gamma Burst → shield → retreat
Support pick: Leap onto support → Lockdown → punch → Gamma Burst → punch → let team finish
Shield engage: Leap → shield immediately → absorb damage → Lockdown priority target → punch → retreat
commonMistakes: Diving alone without the team following
Holding the shield too long instead of using it during the engage
Fighting enemy tanks instead of disrupting supports and carries
Wasting Radioactive Lockdown on a full-health tank instead of a support or carry
Staying in the fight after Leap, Shield, and Lockdown are all on cooldown

guides.summary: High-mobility assassin Duelist built around Fortune management — bait a target out, burst them down while isolated, and vanish before the team can punish the dive.
combos: Beginner pick: Steal → Dash → Claw Strike → dash out
Support delete: Steal (build Fortune) → Dash in → Claw Strike spam → artifact ability → Phantom Pursuit if they run → escape
1v1: Steal → Dash → basic attacks → hold the second dash until they commit
commonMistakes: Diving before enemy defensive cooldowns (stuns, heals) are used up
Spending both dashes to engage, leaving no escape after the kill
Ignoring Fortune and diving aggressively while it's low
Fighting the frontline/tanks instead of hunting isolated supports and DPS
Getting greedy for a second kill instead of disengaging after the first
